{{CargoRelic
|name=Falcon Specimen
|class_id=20146
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The lifelike stuffed falcon is still soaring with its wings spread open. It used to be a witch's partner, accompanying her throughout countless combats. The witch passed away, but her loyal follower is still on the side of its master...
|fame=10
|art=31
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=18
|ss1=Per Crow Sashimi used, Snail HP +3<br>Crow Sashimi Eaten: 200/200
|ss2=Per Crow Sashimi used, Snail HP +6<br>Crow Sashimi Eaten: 200/200
|ss3=Per Crow Sashimi used, Snail HP +9<br>Crow Sashimi Eaten: 200/200
|ss4=Per Crow Sashimi used, Snail HP +9<br>Crow Sashimi Eaten: 200/200
|ss7=Per Crow Sashimi used, Snail HP +9<br>Crow Sashimi Eaten: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
